queries.question: Show both patios and verandas where either of which have 50 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Seating_Areas.Name 
FROM Seating_Areas
WHERE (Seating_Areas.Name = "Patio" OR Seating_Areas.Name = "Veranda") AND Seating_Areas.Number_Of_Seats = 50
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?seating_areas a :Seating_Areas .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name_w .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?seating_areas p:Number_Of_Seats ?number_of_seats_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Patio" || STR(?name_w2) = "Veranda")) && (STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "50" || STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "50.0")))
}

queries.question: List all the patios available, also show the 50 seat capacity verandas.
queries.sql:
SELECT Seating_Areas.Name 
FROM Seating_Areas
WHERE Seating_Areas.Name = "Patio" OR Seating_Areas.Name = "Veranda" AND Seating_Areas.Number_Of_Seats = 50
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?seating_areas a :Seating_Areas .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name_w .
  ?seating_areas p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?seating_areas p:Number_Of_Seats ?number_of_seats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Patio" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Veranda" && (STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "50" || STR(?number_of_seats_w) = "50.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all patios and verandas with 50 seats.
